race.comment: DIVINE OFFERING (1) bungled the start then dusted off and attacked the line with venom to be beaten under a length on debut last start over 1250m at Canterbury. Can improve with that race experience now onside. Looks a great chance to break through, particularly on this roomy circuit. ULTIMATE WARRIOR (6) was handy enough in the run but weakened last on debut in the same race as DIVINE OFFERING. Did a bit wrong that day so a more polished performance should see him in the finish. DON'T DOUBT FRANK (8) has been thereabouts at his two starts to date. Enjoys a soft run from the inside alley and cannot be underestimated. IMINASTATE (4) is in the mix dropping back from Saturday metro company at his last two runs.
